task_completion.description: Navigate to the Codes administration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenEMR interface with 'Administration' menu expanded and 'Codes' or 'Services' selected.
Screenshot of the code entry form showing the 'Code Type' dropdown or field set to 'CPT4'.
Screenshot of the code entry form showing the 'Code' input field populated with '99441'.

task_completion.description: Enter the valid description for the procedure
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the code entry form showing the 'Description' field containing keywords 'Telephone', 'E/M', and 'physician'.
Screenshot of the code entry form showing the 'Fee', 'Price', or 'Charge' field set to '45.00' or '45'.

task_completion.description: Verify the code is saved and appears in the list
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Codes list or search results displaying the saved entry with code '99441', type 'CPT4', and fee '$45.00'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenEMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenEMR web application UI (browser window, standard OpenEMR theme), not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use SQL injection or backend tools
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands or phpMyAdmin interfaces; interaction is strictly through the 'Administration > Codes' forms.

integrity.description: Verify data entry happened during the session
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the form being filled out (e.g., text cursors, dropdowns open) rather than just a static final result.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected procedure code is '99441'. The expected code type is 'CPT4'. The description should describe 'Telephone E/M' services by a 'physician'. The fee must be set to $45.00.
